runners.formComment: Has been in the minors the last two, the latest showing strong pace early but gathered in and finished a 2.25 lengths second over 400m this track in 22.87. Expected to go very well.

runners.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. At the last start finished 4th on April 8 over 435m at Sale behind Otto Rose beaten 2 lengths (24.64) in a Rank Limit - Grade 7. Has a sharp 25.91 PB at this course and distance. Among the chances.

runners.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fifth but before that won by a neck at this track (22.65) beating Miss Bernardo in a Mix 6/7 on March 31. Well placed and among the chances here.

runners.formComment: Backs up after winning by one length at Sale (24.50) beating Wax Off in a Rank Limit - Grade 7 on April 8 six days ago. This is much harder assignment and he needs to find another gear.

runners.formComment: Strong performance on debut, to score by 5.5 lengths in a Maiden last start at Sale, recording a dominant 24.32 over the 435m journey. Expected to push the clock again here.

runners.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 5th over 515m at Sandown beaten 15 lengths (30.64) behind Lush Hour in a Mix 6/7 on April 6. Placed two back at Sandown. More than capable and well placed to find his best form.
